title: Helg
description: Adds a new type of ore, can be found around sunflowers and is used to craft a new set of armor.
body:
This mod's idea came from a typo a friend made a long time ago. Back then we jokingly planned to make it a minecraft mod. Years later, I've started actually creating the mod to start learning minecraft modding.

## 
### **The mod adds:**

<details>
<summary>features</summary>
  
  - **Helg shard**
    - can be crafted into an ingot as shown in the gallery
  
  - **Helgerite ingot**
    - can be used to craft into a set of armor or a block

  - **Helgerite armor set**
    - an armor tier between iron and diamond
  
  - **Helgerite Horse Armor**
    - craftable with Helgerite Ingots
  
  - **Helg Horse Armor**
    - an uncraftable item that can be found where other Horse Armor generates

  - **Helgerite Block**
    - requires a diamond shovel to be mined

  - **Helg ore**
    - can be found around sunflowers and needs an iron shovel to be mined

  - **Helgerite entity**
    - a flying entity which spawns in swamps
    - can be temped by holding a Helg block

</details>

##
### **Known issues**
Currently none! If you find any, please contact me via discord or open an issue on github.
